personal.bio: I'm a Computer Science Engineer passionate about building high-quality digital products. I specialize in Full Stack development and mobile applications, always striving to write clean, scalable code with great UX.
personal.bio2: I'm passionate about building products that combine a thoughtful user experience with clean, maintainable code. Always looking to learn new technologies and apply best practices in every project.

items.title: Project Alpha
items.description: A full-featured web app with authentication, real-time dashboard and REST API.
items.longDescription: Detailed description of the project. What problem it solves, how it solves it and what you learned building it.

items.title: Mobile App
items.description: Cross-platform mobile application with push notifications and offline sync.
items.longDescription: Detailed description of the mobile app. Supported platforms, technical challenges and solutions adopted.

items.title: API Service
items.description: RESTful microservice with JWT authentication, rate limiting and auto-generated docs.
items.longDescription: API built with clean architecture, integration tests and Swagger documentation.

items.title: Extra Project
items.description: Productivity tool with a minimalist interface and cloud synchronization.
items.longDescription: Additional description for the fourth project.

items.title: Software Engineer
items.description: Full stack feature development, performance optimization and collaboration on architecture design.

items.title: Full Stack Developer (Intern)
items.description: Participated in the full development lifecycle of a SaaS platform: from design to production deployment.

items.title: BSc in Computer Science
items.description: Specialization in Software Engineering. Final thesis on microservices architectures.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm open to new opportunities, freelance projects or just a chat about technology. Feel free to reach out.
